memberdef.name: XHDCP22_RX_P_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 64 /** RSA private parameter size in bytes */

memberdef.name: XHDCP22_RX_PRIVATEKEY_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 320 /** RSA private key size (64*5) in bytes */

memberdef.name: XHDCP22_RX_LC128_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 16 /** Lc128 global constant size in bytes */

memberdef.name: XHDCP22_RX_DDC_WRITE_REG
memberdef.initializer: 0x60 /** Address of DDC write message register */

memberdef.name: XHDCP22_RX_DDC_RXSTATUS0_REG
memberdef.initializer: 0x70 /** Address of first DDC RxStatus register */

memberdef.name: XHDCP22_RX_DDC_RXSTATUS1_REG
memberdef.initializer: 0x71 /** Address of second DDC RxStatus register */

memberdef.name: XHDCP22_RX_DDC_READ_REG
memberdef.initializer: 0x80 /** Address of DDC read message register */

memberdef.name: XHDCP22_RX_TMR_CTR_0
memberdef.initializer: 0 /** First timer counter, used for log timestamps */

memberdef.name: XHDCP22_RX_TMR_CTR_1
memberdef.initializer: 1 /** Second timer counter, used for protocol timeout*/

memberdef.name: XHDCP22_RX_TEST_DDC_REGMAP_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 5 /** Size of ddc register map for testing */

briefdescription.para: These constants are the message identification codes.
These constants define the error conditions encountered during authentication and key exchange.
Write message buffer ready to read.
Read message buffer ready to write.
These constants defines the DDC flags used to determine when messages are available in the write message buffer or when a message has been read out of the read message buffer.
RSA decryption of Km computation start.
RSA decryption of Km computation done.
Session key exchange Ks computation start.
Session key exchange Ks computation done.
These constants are the detailed logging events.
Directed test flag [No_Stored_km with Repeater], Sequence: [List, ListAck, StreamManage, StreamReady].
Directed test flag [Stored_km with Repeater], Sequence: [List, ListAck, StreamManage, StreamReady].
Directed test flag [Repeater Misordered Sequence 1], Sequence: [StreamManage, StreamReady, List, ListAck].
Directed test flag [Repeater Misordered Sequence 2], Sequence [List, StreamManage, StreamReady, ListAck].
Directed test flag [Repeater Misordered Sequence 3], Sequence [List, StreamManage, ListAck, StreamReady].
Last value the list, only used for checking.
These constants are used for setting up the desired unit test for standalong testing.
Test mode to emulate transmitter internally used for unit testing.
Test mode to emulate transmitter externally used for loopback testing.
Last value the list, only used for checking.
These constants are used to set the cores test mode.
These constants define the test ddc access types for standalone self testing.
These constants are the discrete event states for standalone self testing.
This function is used to calculate the Montgomery NPrime.

detaileddescription.para: NPrime is calculated from the following equation R*Rinv - N*NPrime == 1. For the HDCP2.2 receiver the modulus N has a fixed size of k = 512bits. Given k, the value R = 2^(k), and Rinv is the modular inverse of R.
Reference: Analyzing and Comparing Montgomery Multiplication Algorithms IEEE Micro, 16(3):26-33,June 1996 By: Cetin Koc, Tolga Acar, and Burton Kaliski

parameterdescription.para: is the calculated value and 2*NDigits in Size.
is modulus
is the integer precision of arguments (N, NPrime), which should always be 16 for the HDCP2.2 receiver.
is a pointer to the XHdcp22_Rx core instance.
is the number of octets in the random number.
is a pointer to the random number.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XHdcp22_Rx_KpubRx *KpubRx, const u8 *Message, const u32 MessageLen, const u8 *MaskingSeed, u8 *EncryptedMessage)
memberdef.name: XHdcp22Rx_RsaesOaepEncrypt

briefdescription.para: This function implements the RSAES-OAEP-Encrypt operation.

detaileddescription.para: The message is encoded using EME-OAEP and then encrypted with the public key using RSAEP.

parameterdescription.para: is the RSA public key structure containing the 1024 bit modulus and 24 bit public exponent.
is the octet string to be encrypted.
is the length of octet string to be encrypted and must be less than or equal to (nLen - 2*hLen - 2)
is the random octet string seed of length hLen used by EME-OAEP encoding function.
is the output octet string after encryption.

briefdescription.para: This function implements the RSAES-OAEP-Decrypt operation.

detaileddescription.para: The message is decrypted using RSADP and then decoded using EME-OAEP.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the MMULT instance.
is the RSA private key structure containing the quintuple.
is the 128 byte octet string to be decrypted.
is the octet string after decryption.
is the length of the message octet string after decryption.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 *Rrx, const u8 *RxCaps, const u8 *Rtx, const u8 *TxCaps, const u8 *Km, u8 *HPrime)
memberdef.name: XHdcp22Rx_ComputeHPrime

briefdescription.para: This function computes HPrime used during HDCP 2.2 authentication and key exchange.

parameterdescription.para: is the Rx random generated value.
are the capabilities of the receiver.
is the Tx random generated value.
are the capabilities of the receiver.
is the master key generated by tx.
is a pointer to the HPrime hash from the HDCP2.2 receiver.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 *KprivRx, const u8 *Km, const u8 *M, u8 *Ekh)
memberdef.name: XHdcp22Rx_ComputeEkh

briefdescription.para: This function computes Ekh used during HDCP 2.2 authentication and key exchange for pairing with receiver.

parameterdescription.para: is the RSA private key structure containing the quintuple.
is the master key generated by tx.
is constructed by concatenating Rtx || Rrx.
is the encrypted Km used for pairing.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 *Rn, const u8 *Km, const u8 *Rrx, const u8 *Rtx, u8 *LPrime)
memberdef.name: XHdcp22Rx_ComputeLPrime

briefdescription.para: This function computes LPrime used during HDCP 2.2 locality check.

parameterdescription.para: is the 64-bit psuedo-random nonce generated by the transmitter.
is the 128-bit master key generated by tx.
is the 64-bit pseudo-random number generated by the receiver.
is the 64-bit pseudo-random number generated by the transmitter.
is the 256-bit value generated for locality check.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 *Rrx, const u8 *Rtx, const u8 *Km, const u8 *Rn, const u8 *Eks, u8 *Ks)
memberdef.name: XHdcp22Rx_ComputeKs

briefdescription.para: This function computes the Ks used during HDCP 2.2 session key exchange.

parameterdescription.para: is the Rx random generated value.
is the Tx random generated value.
is the master key generated by the transmitter.
is the 64-bit psuedo-random nonce generated by the transmitter.
is the encrypted session generated by the transmitter.
is the decrypted session key.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 *ReceiverIdList, u32 ReceiverIdListSize, const u8 *RxInfo, const u8 *SeqNumV, const u8 *Km, const u8 *Rrx, const u8 *Rtx, u8 *VPrime)
memberdef.name: XHdcp22Rx_ComputeVPrime

briefdescription.para: This function computes VPrime used during HDCP 2.2 repeater authentication.

parameterdescription.para: is a list of downstream receivers IDs in big-endian order. Each receiver ID is 5 Bytes.
is the number of receiver Ids in ReceiverIdList. There can be between 1 and 31 devices in the list.
is the 16-bit field in the RepeaterAuth_Send_ReceiverID_List message.
is the 24-bit field in the RepeaterAuth_Send_ReceiverID_List
is the 128-bit master key generated by tx.
is the 64-bit pseudo-random number generated by the receiver.
is the 64-bit pseudo-random number generated by the transmitter.
is the 256-bit value generated for repeater authentication.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 *StreamIdType, const u8 *SeqNumM, const u8 *Km, const u8 *Rrx, const u8 *Rtx, u8 *MPrime)
memberdef.name: XHdcp22Rx_ComputeMPrime

briefdescription.para: This function computes VPrime used during HDCP 2.2 repeater authentication.

parameterdescription.para: is the 16-bit field in the RepeaterAuth_Send_ReceiverID_List message.
is the 24-bit field in the RepeaterAuth_Stream_Manage message.
is the 128-bit master key generated by tx.
is the 64-bit pseudo-random number generated by the receiver.
is the 64-bit pseudo-random number generated by the transmitter.
is the 256-bit value generated for repeater stream management ready.
